response: **THE FOUNDATION OF TRUST**-COMMUNITY BEGINS WITH AUTHENTIC RELATIONSHIPS-BUILDING TRUST REQUIRES CONSISTENT PRESENCE AND EMPATHY-LEADERS MUST LISTEN MORE THAN THEY SPEAK TO UNDERSTAND NEEDS-TRUST IS THE BEDROCK UPON WHICH ALL OTHER EFFORTS REST-WITHOUT TRUST THE COMMUNITY REMAINS FRAGILE AND DIVIDED-###-**CULTIVATING SHARED VISION**-A UNIFIED VISION GUIDES THE COLLECTIVE ACTION OF THE GROUP-PASTORS MUST ARTICULATE A CLEAR PURPOSE THAT RESONATES WITH ALL-MEMBERS NEED TO FEEL OWNERSHIP OVER THE MISSION TO ENGAGE DEEPLY-SHARED VALUES CREATE A SENSE OF BELONGING AND DIRECTION-THIS VISION UNIFIES DIVERSE VOICES INTO A SINGLE HARMONY-###-**SUSTAINING LONG-TERM GROWTH**-ONGOING FORMATION KEEPS THE COMMUNITY VITAL AND RELEVANT-REGULAR GATHERINGS STRENGTHEN BONDS AND REINFORCE IDENTITY-LEADERSHIP DEVELOPMENT ENSURES THE GROUP THRIVES BEYOND ONE PERSON-SUSTAINABILITY COMES FROM EMPOWERING EVERY MEMBER TO CONTRIBUTE-THIS APPROACH GUARANTEES ENDURING IMPACT FOR GENERATIONS TO COME
